exact_prompt.text: FINAL EXACT PROTOCOL REVIEW. Read-only. Repo `/home/worker/.pi/agent/skills/pi-astack`. Review the complete current `round_13_protocol` object whose required SHA-256 is `b53bc2692fc65f478301597756217a097bb2b2627a74c4c3ef5cd82ef1684a76`, from plan `docs/evidence/adr0040-real-policy-proposition-append-design/append-authorization-plan.json`, plus identical object in dossier, design note, corrected ADR/current-state/roadmap/P2b1 status text. Independently recompute protocol hash and assess the WHOLE protocol, not only a delta: same-OFD `/usr/bin/flock -xn 3`, retained bwrap/verified-FD confinement, deterministic repo staging, C0a/C0b/C1/Ccommit, bootstrap vs recovery authorization, target-first S0-S4, terminal COMPLETE/INCOMPLETE precedence, observation-bounded claims, real production ZFS/no-fallback Stage2, exact 8 Stage2 paths and 3 Stage3 repo paths, frozen tuple, no current implementation/append authority. Also verify status docs now state Round6 historical milestone vs Round13 six isolated contexts from only Anthropic/OpenAI and no Round13 participation claim for DeepSeek/MiniMax/Moonshot/Z.ai. Return verdict SIGN/REVISE/BLOCK and concise exact claims. State whether any strictly better in-scope protocol remains. Do not write.

exact_returned_output.text:
**Verdict: SIGN**

Recomputed RFC8785-JCS SHA-256 for the complete `round_13_protocol`: `b53bc2692fc65f478301597756217a097bb2b2627a74c4c3ef5cd82ef1684a76`. The object is structurally identical in the [canonical plan](/home/worker/.pi/agent/skills/pi-astack/docs/evidence/adr0040-real-policy-proposition-append-design/append-authorization-plan.json) and [read-only dossier](/home/worker/.pi/agent/skills/pi-astack/docs/evidence/2026-07-14-adr0040-real-policy-proposition-append-read-only-preview-dossier.json). Plan, dossier, and all six reviews are exact JCS+LF, their raw/self hashes validate, and dossier review pointers equal the plan’s.

The whole protocol is coherent: same-OFD `flock -xn 3` locking with BUSY/no-check semantics; retained verified-FD/bwrap confinement; deterministic repo evidence no-replace staging; C0a/C0b/C1/Ccommit; stricter bootstrap versus preserved-intent recovery authorization; target-first S0-S4; terminal `COMPLETE` / `target_durable_evidence_incomplete` precedence; observation-bounded incomplete claims; and real-production ZFS-only Stage2 with no fallback. The Stage2 list is exactly eight create-only paths, the Stage3 repo surface is exactly ratification, intent, and one terminal post-dossier path, and the frozen tuple remains consistent.

The required target shard/event and all eight future Stage2 paths are presently absent. The plan grants neither implementation nor append authority.

The [design note](/home/worker/.pi/agent/skills/pi-astack/docs/notes/2026-07-14-adr0040-real-policy-proposition-append-design.md), [ADR](/home/worker/.pi/agent/skills/pi-astack/docs/adr/0040-unified-proposition-evidence-model.md), [current state](/home/worker/.pi/agent/skills/pi-astack/docs/current-state.md), [roadmap](/home/worker/.pi/agent/skills/pi-astack/docs/roadmap.md), and [P2b.1 note](/home/worker/.pi/agent/skills/pi-astack/docs/notes/2026-07-14-adr0040-p2b1-stable-view-design.md) correctly distinguish Round 6 as the historical six-vendor milestone from Round 13’s six isolated contexts across Anthropic and OpenAI only. They make no Round13 participation claim for DeepSeek, MiniMax, Moonshot, or Z.ai.

No strictly better in-scope protocol remains identified. The design closes the earlier lock and recovery weaknesses without weakening the fixed-tuple, no-replace, confinement, durable-state, or authorization boundaries.

reviewer.identity_basis: provider/model route observed in dispatch task metadata and matching successful tool-result task metadata
